name: story-agent
description: Agentic story delivery system — MCP server + Next.js dashboard

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @story-agent/shared build && pnpm --filter @story-agent/mcp-server build && pnpm --filter @story-agent/ui build && pnpm --filter story-agent-vscode build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @story-agent/shared build && pnpm --filter @story-agent/mcp-server typecheck && pnpm --filter @story-agent/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter story-agent-vscode typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
scripts.bridge:all: pnpm --filter @story-agent/shared build && pnpm run crew:sync-ui && concurrently --names MCP,UI,MONITOR --colors magenta,blue,cyan "pnpm run mcp" "pnpm run bridge:view" "npx ts-node scripts/list-all-stories.ts"
scripts.publish:local: pnpm run web:build-local && pnpm run ext:package
scripts.crew:seed: CREW_LLM_PROVIDER=demo pnpm --filter @story-agent/mcp-server exec node --input-type=module -e "import { seedAllCrewSkillManifests } from './dist/src/lib/crew-skill-system.js'; await seedAllCrewSkillManifests(); console.log('✅ Crew skill manifests seeded');"
scripts.crew:check: CREW_LLM_PROVIDER=demo pnpm --filter @story-agent/mcp-server exec node --input-type=module -e "import { generateCrewIntegrityReport } from './dist/src/lib/crew-integrity.js'; const report = await generateCrewIntegrityReport(); console.log(JSON.stringify(report, null, 2));"
